mapper.select: SELECT id, user, password, role, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt,deleted_at as deletedAt FROM users
SELECT id, user, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM users WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (user, password, role,created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{user}, #{password},#{role},CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET user = #{user}, password = #{password}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
